ingredients_text:
33% ramen noodle (water, 42% _wheat_
flour, canola oil, salt, lactic acid, sodium phosphate, dL-alpha-tocopherol), 66% miso broth (water, 8% miso paste (_soybean_, rice, salt, water), salt, dried anchovy, sugar, yeast extract), 1% spice pack (dried corn, dried spring onion).
